title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS812-8DS-2DQ-2DDQ-RM
description: The CRS812 DDQ is a device designed for connecting network components with high data transfer requirements , supporting speeds of up to 400 Gbps . The unit is powered by a high-performance quad-core ARM AL52400 processor running at 2 GH z and equipped with 4 GB DDR4 RAM For network connectivity, it provides (2) Ethernet ports supporting speeds of 1G / 2.5G / 5G / 10G , as well as slots for optical transceiver modules with various data transfer rates. The device supports the following module types: (8) SFP56 (1G / 2.5G / 5G / 10G / 25G / 50G), (2) QSFP56 (40G / 50G / 100G / 200G), and (2) QSFP-DD (40G / 50G / 100G / 200G / 400G) The QSFP56 and QSFP-DD ports also support breakout mode, which allows reducing the transmission speed to 1G / 2.5G / 5G / 10G / 25G / 50G To ensure higher resistance to power outages, the device is equipped with (2) redundant hot-swap power supplies and (4) hot-swap cooling fans . In the event of a power supply or hot-swap cooling fan failture can be replaced without the need to shut down the switch High performance: AL52400 Quad-core 2 GHz ARM CPU, 4 GB DDR4 RAM Storage size: 512 MB NAND Ethernet ports: (2) 1G/2.5G/5G/10G Optical modules: (8) SFP56, (2) QSFP56 a (2) QSFP-DD Number of AC inputs: (2) redundan hot-swap power supplies Cooling: (4) hot-swap cooling fans Operation system: RouterOS v7, License level 6 Device Mounting accessories (2) Power cords
